rulings.Case Title: JACQUELINE GREAUX VS. BETTY ANN MORRIS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendant Mark Epstein Ind And Dba The Epstein Group'S Demurrer To Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, October 25, 2012, line 1. Defendant Mark Epstein Individually And Dba The Epstein Group'S Demurrer To Complaint. Sustain with leave to amend to comply with CC 1714.10 regarding action against counsel or to assert cause of action as to property manager only. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JACQUELINE GREAUX VS. BETTY ANN MORRIS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendant Mark Epstein Ind And Dba The Epstein Group'S Motion To Strike
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, October 25, 2012, line 1. Defendant Mark Epstein Individually And Dba The Epstein Group'S Motion To Strike. Off Calendar - moot. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MANUELA ALVAREZ VS. WELLS FARGO BANK et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, October 25, 2012, line 2. DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO BANK SOUTHWEST, N.A.'s AMENDED DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Sustain with leave to amend to address issues raised by demurrer. No opposition filed. Prevailing party to prepare order. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: RODOLFO VELASQUEZ VS. BANK OF AMERICA NATIONAL ASSOCIATION et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc And Motion For Reconsideraton Or To Vacate The Court'S Order Re: Amount Of Bond
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, October 25, 2012, line 3. PLAINTIFF RODOLFO VELASQUEZ's Motion For Reconsideration Or To Vacate The Court'S Order Re: Amount Of Bond. Deny, plaintiff's motion void of any legal basis for motion to vacate and fails to meet standard of 1008 motion. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: RONALD ARTAC VS. ADAM BLINN et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Preliminary Injunction
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, October 25, 2012, line 4. PLAINTIFF RONALD ARTAC's Motion For Preliminary Injunction. Off Calendar - failed to post bond and failed to file TRO rendering this untimely per CCP 1008. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ANTONIO CASTELLUCCI VS. SHANE KROL et al

rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, October 25, 2012, line 5. DEFENDANT SHANE KROLL's Motion For Relief From Forfeiture Under Ccp1179. Continued to Oct. 29, 2012 to be heard with motion to vacate. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: KAREN GRIGGI VS. SCOTT MORROW et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Motion For Atty Fees
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, October 25, 2012, line 6. DEFENDANT SCOTT MORROW's Motion For Attorney Fees. Grant attorney fees of $48,020, legal extern fees of $850 costs of $1256.74 total: $50,126.74. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: KAREN GRIGGI VS. RAFAEL SEGURA et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, October 25, 2012, line 7. DEFENDANT RAFAEL SEGURA's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. Continued to Oct. 26, 2012 to be heard with Oct. 26, 2012 motion. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, VS. LARRY CHEW et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, UNLAWFUL DETAINER
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, October 25, 2012, line 8. PLAINTIFF JPMORGAN CHASE BANK's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. Grant, no triable issue of material fact. No competent evidence in opposition. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: LI XIA LIANG VS. JOHN JOSEPH MCKEON et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, October 25, 2012, line 9. DEFENDANT JOHN MCKEON's MOTION TO SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT. Deny, failed to sustain burdern per 473. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: AUGUSTO APOLONIO VS. JOE L MASSEY et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, October 25, 2012, line 11. DEFENDANT JOE MASSEY's MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT. Grant, non opposition filed. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: AUGUSTO APOLONIO VS. JOE L MASSEY et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, October 25, 2012, line 11. DEFENDANT JOE MASSEY's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Overrule, five days to answer. 1) Premises sufficiently identified; 2) Even if attacked notice was in error the other two remain. = (501/REQ)
